caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a musical event or concert. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery and a red pendant featuring a black design. The man has glasses and his hair is tied back. He is holding an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, suggesting he is either playing a song or speaking to the audience. The background consists of wooden blinds, indicating an indoor setting. The word "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the venue or the event. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, with some heads and shoulders in view, showing that the performance is being watched by a group of people.
